reviews.author: Joanne Koong
reviews.summary: This patch is a preparatory step for fuse io-uring, which needs to select a buffer from a kernel-managed bufring while the uring mutex may be held. The export of io_ring_buffer_select() will allow this.

2026-03-06.patch_summary: This patch exports the io_ring_buffer_select() function, allowing callers to select a buffer from a kernel-managed bufring without needing to grab the io_uring mutex. This is necessary for fuse io-uring, which may need to select a buffer in atomic contexts while the uring mutex is held.
